sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84261" key="poikileu/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ποικῐλ-εύομαι</orth>, <sense id="n84261.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be versatile</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">artful,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:4:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
